subcodes.first_line: Tyranny hath appeared on every side. Where are Thy swords of vengeance, O Avenger of the worlds? Bahá hath been imprisoned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الاعتساف فی کل الاطراف این اسیاف جزآئک یا مجزی العالمین قد حبس البهاء
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @the power of words; of speech, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
